channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Is the stock market in an AI bubble?
item.description: When it comes to AI investments, “a lot of money is going to get wasted,” MIT professor Daron Acemoglu told Bloomberg.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk will attend Trump’s Pennsylvania rally at site of first assassination attempt
item.description: Elon Musk is set to attend Donald Trump’s campaign rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, on Saturday, marking an even deeper show of the billionaire’s support for the former president and his shift to the right.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: The Daily Word: Unraveling the Mysteries of NYT Strands
item.description: Explore the latest hints and answers to NYT Strands, a challenging word game that requires strategic thinking and vocabulary skills.
item.dc:creator: marc.mclaren@futurenet.com (Marc McLaren), TechRadar

item.title: Node.js previews network inspection support
item.description: Node.js v20.18.0, a just-introduced update to the Long-Term Support (LTS) version of the popular asynchronous, event-driven JavaScript runtime, features experimental network inspection support. Introduced October 3, Node.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Buttigieg dismisses Musk's Helene federal response claims
item.description: Department of Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg called out tech giant Elon Musk on Friday for making false claims about the federal government blocking flights with deliveries for Hurricane Helene victims.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: MIAMI, Okla. (AP) — Shawnee Tribe Chief Ben Barnes grew up playing video games, including “probably hundreds of hours” colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier's Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: De la ‘sala de máquinas’ a la junta directiva: el nuevo rol del CIO, a debate en el CIO Summit 2024
item.description: Los debates marcaron, una vez más, gran parte de la agenda de la última edición de CIO Summit 2024, celebrado en Madrid los pasados 25 y 26 de septiembre.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google says it will stop linking to New Zealand news if a law passes forcing it to pay for content
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Google said Friday it will stop linking to New Zealand news content and will reverse its support of local media outlets if the government passes a law forcing tech companies to pay for articles displayed on their platforms.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Does your SMB have the foundation in place for GenAI?
item.description: The extraordinary potential of generative AI (GenAI) has seen businesses scrambling to adopt the technology and realize untapped opportunities. But building an AI strategy is more than just deploying the newest GenAI tools.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google's search engine's latest AI injection will answer voiced questions about video and photos
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is injecting its search engine with more artificial intelligence that will enable people to voice questions about images and occasionally organize an entire page of results, despite the technology's past misadventures with misleading information.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The bigger the better? Approaching Generative AI by size
item.description: As the Generative AI (GenAI) hype continues, we’re seeing an uptick of real-world, enterprise-grade solutions in industries from healthcare and finance, to retail and media.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cupertino spared from paying state millions in Apple sales tax revenue
item.description: The news comes just months after Cupertino allocated $56.5 million from its budget to repay the state.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Lam, The Mercury News

item.title: The Impact of OpenAI's Exclusivity Deal on the AI Industry: A Game-Changer?
item.description: OpenAI raises $6.6 billion, but with conditions that might stifle innovation in the AI industry. We explore the implications of this deal and its potential expansion plans.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI previews Realtime API for speech-to-speech apps
item.description: OpenAI has introduced a public beta of the Realtime API, an API that allows paid developers to build low-latency, multi-modal experiences including text and speech in apps.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Musk sending Starlink terminals to storm-ravaged North Carolina
item.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk said Tuesday the aerospace company is sending more Starlink terminals to North Carolina following the widespread devastation of Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: iPhone's satellite messaging: A lifeline in Hurricane Helene's aftermath
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how iOS 18’s satellite messaging helps isolated residents seek help in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: After Change Healthcare, HHS building cyber incident response team
item.description: In the wake of the Change Healthcare ransomware attack, HHS has been expanding its "one-stop shop" for working with the healthcare sector on cyber issues. The post After Change Healthcare, HHS building cyber incident response team first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: For Fiscal Service, intelligent automation transforms federal workflows
item.description: At the Bureau of the Fiscal Service, automation is helping to reduce manual workloads, and to increase employee efficiency and morale. The post For Fiscal Service, intelligent automation transforms federal workflows first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Dana Sukontarak, Federal News Network

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PyTorch library makes models faster and smaller
item.description: The PyTorch Foundation, makers of the PyTorch machine learning framework, has launched torchao, a PyTorch native library that makes models faster and smaller by leveraging low-bit dtypes, sparsity, and quantization.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, PIX 11
